allow: Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); // Read the SQLite file raw to find category pivot data // Instead let's check ShopController to see what it passes ")
Bash(git -C c:/Users/info/sbn-app diff --stat HEAD~5 -- resources/ app/Http/Controllers/Library/)
PowerShell($php = \(Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($php\) { Write-Output "php: $\($php.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "no php on PATH" })

PowerShell(php -r '$db=new PDO\("sqlite:database/sbn.db"\); $cols=$db->query\("PRAGMA table_info\(leadsheets\)"\)->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_COLUMN,1\); echo implode\(", ",$cols\)."\\n---\\n"; $rows=$db->query\("SELECT id,title,slug,status FROM leadsheets WHERE title LIKE \\"%maria%\\" OR title LIKE \\"%luisa%\\" OR slug LIKE \\"%maria%\\""\)->fetchAll\(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC\); print_r\($rows\);')
